config_entries.label: URL
config_entries.description: URL to which to send the request.

config_entries.label: Capture Response
config_entries.description: when set to `true`, the response data will be captured and placed into the `body` variable as a `std::string` for use in [lambdas](https://esphome.io/automations/templates#config-lambda). Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Collect Headers
config_entries.description: List of the names of HTTP headers to collect from the response.

config_entries.label: Max Response Buffer Size
config_entries.description: The maximum buffer size to be used to store the response. Defaults to `1 kB`.

config_entries.label: Request Headers
config_entries.description: Map of HTTP headers. Values are [templatable](https://esphome.io/automations/templates).
